title: HealthLog – Metrics Explorer
description: Apple Health-style deep-dive into any single metric. Select a Category, then a Metric from the cascading dropdowns. All panels update automatically: latest reading, 7-day average, 30-day min/max, daily trend with 7-day moving average, intraday range, sample count, and raw samples.

links.title: Fitness
links.tooltip: Open Fitness dashboard (CTL/ATL/TSB, load ratio & focus; opens with its own future-extended time range)

list.name: category
list.label: Category
list.description: Metric category from the metric_registry table. Metrics without a registry entry appear under 'other'.
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(r.category, 'other') FROM (SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM metric_samples) m LEFT JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = m.metric ORDER BY 1

list.name: metric
list.label: Metric
list.description: Metric within the selected category. Display name comes from metric_registry.display_name; falls back to the raw metric key.
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(r.display_name, m.metric) AS __text, m.metric AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM metric_samples) m LEFT JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = m.metric WHERE COALESCE(r.category, 'other') = '$category' ORDER BY 1

list.name: unit
list.label: Unit
list.description: Canonical unit for the selected metric (auto-populated from metric_registry, hidden from UI).
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(unit_canonical, '') FROM metric_registry WHERE metric = '$metric'

panels.title: Latest Reading ($unit)
panels.description: Most recent daily aggregated value. Aggregation method (sum/min/avg/max) is defined per metric in the metric_registry.

targets.rawSql: SELECT d.day AS time, ROUND((CASE r.agg_default WHEN 'sum' THEN d.sum WHEN 'min' THEN d.vmin WHEN 'max' THEN d.vmax ELSE d.avg END)::numeric, 2) AS "Latest" FROM daily_metrics d JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = d.metric WHERE d.metric = '$metric' AND $__timeFilter(d.day::timestamptz) ORDER BY d.day

panels.title: 7-Day Average ($unit)
panels.description: Average of the daily aggregated values over the last 7 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE r.agg_default WHEN 'sum' THEN d.sum WHEN 'min' THEN d.vmin WHEN 'max' THEN d.vmax ELSE d.avg END)::numeric, 2) AS "7-day avg" FROM daily_metrics d JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = d.metric WHERE d.metric = '$metric' AND d.day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

panels.title: 30-Day Minimum ($unit)
panels.description: Minimum of the daily aggregated values within the last 30 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(MIN(CASE r.agg_default WHEN 'sum' THEN d.sum WHEN 'min' THEN d.vmin WHEN 'max' THEN d.vmax ELSE d.avg END)::numeric, 2) AS "30-day min" FROM daily_metrics d JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = d.metric WHERE d.metric = '$metric' AND d.day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'

panels.title: 30-Day Maximum ($unit)
panels.description: Maximum of the daily aggregated values within the last 30 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(MAX(CASE r.agg_default WHEN 'sum' THEN d.sum WHEN 'min' THEN d.vmin WHEN 'max' THEN d.vmax ELSE d.avg END)::numeric, 2) AS "30-day max" FROM daily_metrics d JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = d.metric WHERE d.metric = '$metric' AND d.day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'

panels.title: Daily Value — ${metric:text} ($unit)
panels.description: Daily aggregated value per the metric_registry agg_default (sum/min/avg/max). Dashed grey line is the 7-day moving average.

targets.rawSql: SELECT d.day AS time, ROUND((CASE r.agg_default WHEN 'sum' THEN d.sum WHEN 'min' THEN d.vmin WHEN 'max' THEN d.vmax ELSE d.avg END)::numeric, 2) AS "Daily value" FROM daily_metrics d JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = d.metric WHERE d.metric = '$metric' AND $__timeFilter(d.day::timestamptz) ORDER BY d.day

SELECT d.day AS time, ROUND(AVG(CASE r.agg_default WHEN 'sum' THEN d.sum WHEN 'min' THEN d.vmin WHEN 'max' THEN d.vmax ELSE d.avg END) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 2) AS "7d Trend" FROM daily_metrics d JOIN metric_registry r ON r.metric = d.metric WHERE d.metric = '$metric' AND $__timeFilter(d.day::timestamptz) ORDER BY d.day

panels.title: Intraday Range — min / avg / max ($unit)
panels.description: Daily intraday min, avg, and max from daily_metrics. Shows within-day variability. Only meaningful for metrics with multiple samples per day (e.g. heart rate, not step_count).

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, ROUND(vmin::numeric, 2) AS "Min", ROUND(avg::numeric, 2) AS "Avg", ROUND(vmax::numeric, 2) AS "Max" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = '$metric' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Sample Count
panels.description: Number of raw samples ingested per day. Gaps or sudden drops may indicate a device sync issue.

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, n AS "Samples" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = '$metric' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day

panels.title: Raw Samples — ${metric:text}  (newest 500)
panels.description: Newest 500 raw records from metric_samples within the selected time range. For high-frequency metrics this covers only a short period; narrow the time range to see older data.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time AS "Time", ROUND(qty::numeric, 3) AS "Qty", ROUND(vmin::numeric, 3) AS "Min", ROUND(vavg::numeric, 3) AS "Avg", ROUND(vmax::numeric, 3) AS "Max", n AS "n", unit AS "Unit", source AS "Source" FROM metric_samples WHERE metric = '$metric' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500
